text:
Created attachment 169966
patch with update to 8.7.2

Hello,

attached a patch to bring GitLab to its current version. Last patch from me for the next two weeks since i'm going into vacation :)

Buildtests are done for 9.3, 10.0, 10.2 and 10.3 amd64 and i386. Also an update and installation was performed to test the major features of the software. 

Greetings,
Torsten
